scene_understanding.spatial_layout: A desktop with a keyboard in the foreground center, a gray cup resting on the keyboard near the left-center, and a mouse resting on the keyboard at the right side. A computer tower stands on the left. Two monitors are behind the keyboard; the left monitor is centered and the right monitor is on the right. A white cap sits on the right monitor base/stand area.

plan.task: move the cup so that it is no longer on the keyboard

object.name: cup
object.attributes: gray cylindrical mug with handle, lightweight desktop container, currently resting on the keyboard

grasp.contact_zone: around the mug body using the side opposite the handle

physical_properties.stability: unstable when lifted, stable when placed on flat surface

plan.action: lift the cup vertically off the keyboard and place it on the open desk surface away from the keyboard
plan.precondition: The cup is resting on top of the keyboard and is reachable without colliding with other objects or cables
plan.postcondition: The cup is no longer in contact with the keyboard and is visibly resting on the desk surface
plan.state_after: The gray cup is moved off the keyboard and placed on the desk, no longer on the keyboard; the keyboard surface is partially cleared.

plan.task: move the mouse so that it is no longer on the keyboard

object.name: mouse
object.attributes: black wired mouse with red scroll indicator, currently resting on the right side of the keyboard

plan.action: lift the mouse off the keyboard and set it down on the open desk surface near the monitor base
plan.precondition: The mouse is resting on the keyboard and its cable has enough slack to move it without tangling
plan.postcondition: The mouse is no longer on the keyboard and is visibly placed on the desk
plan.state_after: The black mouse is removed from the keyboard and placed on the desk surface, leaving the keyboard clear of the mouse.

plan.task: turn the keyboard over

object.name: keyboard
object.attributes: black Lenovo keyboard, flat rectangular input device currently lying on the desk

grasp.contact_zone: left and right edges of the keyboard frame

physical_properties.stability: stable on desk but movable with force

plan.action: lift the keyboard slightly and rotate it 180 degrees to expose its underside
plan.precondition: The keyboard is accessible after the cup and mouse have been removed from it
plan.postcondition: The keyboard is upside down with its underside facing upward and its key side facing the desk
plan.state_after: The keyboard has been turned over; its underside is now visible and it is no longer in its original upright orientation.

plan.task: switch on the computer tower

object.name: computer_tower
object.attributes: Dell OptiPlex 7090 black desktop tower standing upright on the left side of the desk, with a visible power button on the front panel

grasp.contact_zone: front panel area for stabilization while pressing the power button

plan.action: press the front power button on the tower once to switch it on
plan.precondition: The computer tower is powered off or in standby and its front power button is reachable
plan.postcondition: The tower shows evidence of being switched on, such as power status change or indicator light activation
plan.state_after: The computer tower is switched on; the front power control has been pressed and the tower is now in an on state.

plan.task: switch on the computer monitor

object.name: monitor_left
object.attributes: black computer monitor in the center-left of the scene with visible front control area on the lower right bezel

grasp.contact_zone: lower bezel or edge near the power control for stabilization while pressing

plan.action: press the monitor power control on the lower right bezel to switch the monitor on
plan.precondition: The monitor is powered off or in standby and its power control is reachable
plan.postcondition: The monitor shows evidence of being switched on, such as indicator light activation or screen power state change
plan.state_after: The computer monitor is switched on; the display is now in an on state with a visible power change.

scene_understanding.spatial_layout: A gray cup is sitting on the black keyboard tray in front of the right side of the keyboard, with the mouse also on the keyboard tray to the right of the cup. Cables run behind and around the monitors and desk.

object.name: cup

plan.task: turn the keyboard over

object.name: keyboard
object.attributes: black flat keyboard tray with a Lenovo keyboard surface, currently lying flat on the desk

plan.task: switch on the computer tower
